sql_array: CREATE TABLE urls (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url CLOB);
INSERT INTO urls VALUES (1, 'http://example.com');
INSERT INTO urls VALUES (2, 'https://test.com');
SELECT id, sys.gethost(url), (17 ^ 5) AS xor_value FROM urls WHERE sys.gethost(url) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (sys.gethost(url) ^ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM urls)) AS modified_host FROM urls;
SELECT id, (sys.gethost(url) || ' has host code ' || (17 ^ id)) AS extended_info FROM urls GROUP BY id HAVING xor_value > 5;
CREATE TABLE data (value INT, checksum CLOB);
INSERT INTO data VALUES (10, '0');
INSERT INTO data VALUES (20, '0');
SELECT d.value, sys.gethost((SELECT MAX(url) FROM urls)) ^ d.value AS result FROM data d;
SELECT id, sys.gethost('ftp://sample.com') ^ (COALESCE(NULL, 0) + 5) AS xor_result FROM urls;
CREATE TABLE mixed_data (str_val CLOB, num_val INT);
INSERT INTO mixed_data VALUES (NULL, 32);
INSERT INTO mixed_data VALUES ('empty', NULL);
SELECT (sys.gethost((SELECT str_val FROM mixed_data WHERE num_val IS NULL) || ' combines with ' || (17 ^ 15))) AS complex_result FROM mixed_data;
SELECT id, sys.gethost(url) AS host, (17 ^ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM urls)) AS xor_count FROM urls HAVING host IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_data (data_val INT);
INSERT INTO temp_data VALUES (1);
INSERT INTO temp_data VALUES (2);
SELECT (sys.gethost('http://boundary.test.com') || ' XOR Value: ' || (1 ^ value)) AS boundary_test FROM temp_data;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_data;
